subject: npmx Weekly #20
headline: npmx Weekly #20
intro: Exciting updates are brewing within the npm community! Join us as we explore significant advancements in module standards, security practices, and community trust.

topics.title: ESM vs CJS Growth
topics.summary: The adoption of ECMAScript Modules (ESM) has risen to 38.0% among popular npm packages, marking a strong shift from CommonJS to modern JavaScript module standards.

topics.title: Security Incidents in Dependency Management
topics.summary: Recent findings suggest that the common practice of running 'npm install' posed security risks. The introduction of opt-in dependency install scripts in v12 aims to enhance safety in package management.

topics.title: npmx Verification Initiative
topics.summary: npmx is launching a verification initiative for maintainers and projects, enhancing trust and transparency in the open-source community through verified badges.
